description: Core monitoring system parameters / 核心監測系統參數

ma_periods.description: Moving average periods in candles / 移動平均週期（K線數）

volume.description: Volume analysis window and spike threshold / 成交量分析視窗與爆量閾值

patterns.description: Number of consecutive candles for pattern detection / 連續K線型態檢測數量

cooldown_minutes.description: Minimum time between signals of same type / 同類型訊號最小間隔時間

warning_banners.alert_only: ⚠️  ALERT ONLY - NO AUTO TRADING / 僅提醒 - 無自動交易
warning_banners.watch_only: ⚠️  WATCH ONLY SIGNAL - NOT FOR EXECUTION / 僅觀察訊號 - 非執行訊號
